calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-04-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Lavon Granger. Richard M. Lieberman, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, The Granada, Inc. and Defendant, Leif Andrew Kolach appeared in pro per. Also present, Tony Davieauski, Representative of the Plaintiff. The matter settled per stipulation of parties which is read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
